name: bedrock-chat
title: Bedrock Chat
description: Interact with Amazon Bedrock models directly from your command bar
author: hongyilyu

commands.name: ask-clipboard-image
commands.title: Ask Clipboard Image
commands.description: Ask about an image from your clipboard

preferences.name: bedrockApiKey
preferences.description: Enter your Amazon Bedrock API key (bearer token)
preferences.title: Bedrock API Key

preferences.name: bedrockRegion
preferences.description: AWS region for Bedrock (e.g., us-east-1, us-west-2)
preferences.title: Bedrock Region

preferences.name: useStream
preferences.label: Enable streaming completions
preferences.description: Stream the completions of the generated answer
preferences.title: Stream Completion

preferences.name: titleModel
preferences.title: Title Generation Model
preferences.description: Model used to auto-generate conversation titles

preferences.name: titlePrompt
preferences.title: Title Generation Prompt
preferences.description: Custom prompt for generating conversation titles
preferences.default: Generate a short, concise title (5-10 words max) for this conversation. Return only the title text, nothing else.
